description_long: This is a compact, modern cabin with a green metal shed roof and a raised wooden deck that wraps around two sides. The exterior is clad in horizontal shingle-style siding in muted earth tones, with a combination of large and small rectangular windows distributed asymmetrically across the facades. The cabin features a prominent upper clerestory section with additional windows, providing extra natural light to the interior. There are two visible exterior doors: a single white door on one side and a glass-paneled double door opening onto the deck. The structure is elevated on short piers above a grassy base, suggesting suitability for a variety of terrains. The overall design blends contemporary and rustic elements, making it well-suited for urban infill lots or small residential plots.
description: A modern, compact cabin with a green metal shed roof, shingle siding, large windows, and a wraparound wooden deck. The structure is elevated on piers and features both single and double exterior doors.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the cabin with a single white door, a small window, and the green metal roof sloping down toward the back. The wooden deck is visible along the right side.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the glass-paneled double doors opening onto the deck, the clerestory window section above, and a mix of shingle and horizontal siding.
description_view_2: Here, the rear and side of the cabin are visible, featuring a large window, the continuation of the deck, and the upper clerestory windows.
description_view_3: This view shows the long side of the cabin with a large horizontal window, a vertical wood accent panel, and the green roof extending over the clerestory section.
attribute_roof_type: asymmetrical shed roof with a clerestory section, constructed from green metal panels
attribute_window_arrangement: Asymmetrical distribution of rectangular windows, including a large horizontal window, several smaller windows, and a clerestory row of windows on the upper section; windows are grouped in pairs and singles, with varying sizes and placements
attribute_door_placement: One single white door on the short side, and one glass-paneled double door on the adjacent long side opening onto the deck
